flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Delaware Technical Community College-Terry rose 18% between 2017 and 2020 ($8.9k → $10.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Delaware Technical Community College-Terry rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.9k → $5.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Delaware Technical Community College-Terry fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Delaware Technical Community College-Terry rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (20.2% → 22.5%).
